hero.title: Shop Methods.
hero.subtitle: Books, exclusive mentorships, aged-order inserts, refund / SE methods and stealth / OPSec. Pick a category to see every product inside.

categories.title: Evasion Books
categories.tagline: Learn to evade your ban & order cancelations.
categories.longDescription: Comprehensive playbooks covering every angle of ban evasion and order-cancelation defence — store-specific procedures, fraud-score management, identity hygiene and seasoning routines you can run today.

categories.title: Exclusive Mentorships
categories.tagline: Look into our different exclusive Refund & SE mentorships.
categories.longDescription: One-to-one mentorships from operators who run refunds and SE at scale. You learn the live playbook, get assigned drops, and walk away with a repeatable process — not a PDF.

categories.title: Insert Aged Orders
categories.tagline: Age your account the express way! Insert large & high-value orders to your personal account.
categories.longDescription: Stop waiting months to age an account. We insert real, large-value historical orders onto your personal account so it reads as a long-standing, trusted customer from day one.

categories.title: Refund / SE Methods
categories.tagline: Not interested in our all-inclusive mentorships? Look into our various high-quality methods for both Refunds & SE.
categories.longDescription: À-la-carte methods for refund and social-engineering operators who want a specific store or vector without buying the full mentorship.
